{{Quote|It's so strange getting paid for things I used to do in my teens just for fun.|Mike Vilardi|<ref name="Journal" />}}
'''Mike Vilardi''' was an illustrator for numerous [[West End Games]] roleplaying books, articles, and short stories. Vilardi enjoyed creating new alien species,<ref name="Journal">{{Journal|3|About the Artists|nolink=1}}</ref> and repeated a number of original designs throughout his work, such as an [[unidentified stalk-eyed species]].

Others involved in ''Star Wars'' products spoke highly of his work: [[Daniel Wallace|Dan Wallace]] described his work as "constantly a joy,"<ref name="Blog">{{Blog|danwallace|81|Underappreciated Star Wars Writers: Michael Allen Horne}}</ref> and [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]] called Vilardi's work "incomparable."<ref name="Schweig">{{WebCite|url=http://www.destinyrealms.com/griffon/D6SWeds.html|text=WEG's Star Wars RPG: Which Edition?|author=Peter M. Schweighofer|date=2004-02-01|work=destinyrealms.com|archivedate=20070401002951}}</ref> Current ''Star Wars'' artist [[Robin Pronovost]] also names Vilardi as a major influence.<ref>{{SWArchive|url=eu/explore/profile/f20050818/index.html?page=3|text=''Star Wars'' Artist Series: Pronovost - Finding Inspiration}}</ref>
